name: Chicken W/Raspberry Vinegar Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter and oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add chicken and sauté on all sides until golden brown.
3. Remove chicken from the skillet using tongs and sprinkle with salt. Set aside.
4. Drain off excess fat, then return the skillet to heat.
5. Deglaze the pan by adding 3/4 cup raspberry vinegar.
6. Return the chicken to the pan, add the chicken stock, and simmer covered until the chicken is tender and juices run clear.
7. Transfer the chicken to a serving platter and keep warm.
8. Bring the liquid in the pan to a boil, then reduce heat and cook until the sauce reaches the consistency of light cream.
9. Add the whipping cream and reduce the sauce again.
10. Season with additional vinegar, salt, and pepper to taste.
11. Strain the sauce if desired.
12. Pour the sauce over the chicken and serve.
